notes: Shows the compact channel number and name immediately while Tube TV tunes, then keeps it visible briefly after playback begins.
Keeps the detailed bottom playback overlay hidden during channel changes and opens it only from the overlay button.
Moves the scrolling Tater Guide to channel 999 after TaterText and leaves channel 01 available for an optional server channel.
Still starts Tube TV on channel 02 and keeps automatic program and commercial transitions black.
Pairs with Tater Tube Server v1.3.1 for the optional channel 01 setting.
